build_method: Paste ai_builder_prompt into Workflows → + New Workflow → Start with AI. This is TWO workflows technically — build them separately for easier debugging.

workflow_4a.name: WF04a — 90-Day Dormant Check
workflow_4a.ai_builder_prompt: Create a workflow called 'WF04a — 90-Day Dormant Check' with a time-based trigger (Scheduled) that runs daily at 8:00 AM. Filter the contacts the workflow runs against: only contacts that have tag buyer:active AND whose custom field Last Touch Date is more than 90 days ago. For each matching contact: remove tag buyer:active, apply tag buyer:dormant, move Buyer Lifecycle opportunity to stage 'Dormant', update Last Touch Date = today (to prevent re-fire), send internal Slack notification via webhook with message '{{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}} moved to dormant — 90 days no touch'. End workflow.

workflow_4b.name: WF04b — Quarterly POF Re-Verify
workflow_4b.ai_builder_prompt: Create a workflow called 'WF04b — Quarterly POF Re-Verify' with a time-based trigger (Scheduled) that runs daily at 9:00 AM. Filter the contacts: only contacts that have tag buyer:active AND whose custom field Re-verify Due Date is today or earlier. For each matching contact: Step 1: send SMS 'WF04b_SMS_Reverify'. Step 2: update custom field PoF on File = Pending. Step 3: update Last Touch Date = today. Step 4: wait 5 days. Step 5: add if/else condition — has the contact replied to SMS in last 5 days? YES path: create internal task for Brooke titled 'Update POF for {{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}}' due today. NO path: remove tag buyer:active, apply tag buyer:dormant, move pipeline stage to 'Dormant'. End workflow.

messages.WF04b_SMS_Reverify: Quarterly check-in {{contact.first_name}} — need to refresh your POF on file so we keep sending you deals. Reply with updated POF amount + any market/buy box changes. Takes 30 seconds.

critical_note: Every workflow in this build (WF01, WF02, WF03) updates Last Touch Date on every send. If you add new workflows later, make sure they do the same — otherwise WF04a will falsely dormant-flag active buyers.
